case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. LAWRENCE MILLER et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, LAWRENCE DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER D. DAVENPORT. MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY-28-2002 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 414, SUSAN BREALL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT., SENT FOR PROVE-UP.
